name: spatialflow-agent
description: SpatialFlow-specific spatial visual agent harness for an openai/codex fork.

interface.shortDescription: Spatial visual agent harness for SpatialFlow room-design workflows.
interface.longDescription: Adds SpatialFlow-specific working rules, tool contracts, verifier criteria, and rollout artifacts to Codex so the fork behaves like a focused spatial visual agent product instead of a generic coding assistant.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the SpatialFlow spatial-agent skill. Build room-design agent plans as observe -> represent state -> choose action -> execute tool -> verify -> record trace.
